audit.reason: The bounty announcement is clear, engaging, and provides all necessary details for participants. The instructions are well-structured and easy to follow.
audit.improvements: Consider adding more details on the criteria for selecting winners, such as originality of content or level of engagement with the community. Also, specify if there are any restrictions on the types of content that can be submitted.

work:
Title: NEW $200 USDC BOUNTY IN: 

We’re teaming up with @cliqibot 

CliqiBot makes trading on Base effortless. When you like a post containing a Base contract, it automatically buys your preset amount.

To celebrate, @cliqibot is hosting a $200 Creator Bounty for the community. 

How to Enter
🌳 Create content that amplifies @cliqibot and shows how it works.
🌳 Show real use or experience with Cliqi.
🌳 Make your content clear, engaging, and creative.

Submission Steps
1. Post your content on X.
2. Tag and follow @cliqibot and @EverybNeedsBase.
3. Submit your entry on the ENB Bounty App.

Rewards
20 winners will receive $10 each.

Deadline
The bounty ends in 72 hours, on February 22, 2026. Winners will be selected after the deadline.
